evals.prompt: How do I organize our content library in Seismic?
evals.expected_output: Guide to structuring the Seismic content library with content profiles, workspaces, and permissions.

assertions.name: content_profiles_taxonomy
assertions.description: Must explain content profiles as metadata schemas and recommend defining taxonomy (persona, deal stage, product line) before loading content

assertions.name: workspace_vs_library
assertions.description: Must distinguish between workspaces (authoring/editing spaces) and the library (published content for seller consumption)

assertions.name: permission_model
assertions.description: Must address role-based permissions and recommend a governance model for content ownership and access control

evals.prompt: Set up a Digital Sales Room for a multi-stakeholder enterprise deal with 6 buyers.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for creating a DSR with multi-stakeholder engagement tracking and role-based content curation.

assertions.name: dsr_creation_steps
assertions.description: Must walk through creating a Digital Sales Room including naming, branding, adding recipients, and selecting content

assertions.name: per_stakeholder_tracking
assertions.description: Must explain per-stakeholder engagement tracking — who viewed what, time spent, and how to identify champion vs detractor signals

assertions.name: content_curation_by_role
assertions.description: Must recommend curating content by buyer role (e.g., executive summary for C-suite, technical docs for IT, ROI calculator for finance)

evals.prompt: I want to use the Seismic API to auto-generate personalized proposals with LiveDocs. How do I set that up?
evals.expected_output: API guidance for LiveDocs generation with authentication and Express vs Process distinction.

assertions.name: api_reference
assertions.description: Must point to references/seismic-api-reference.md for full API documentation

assertions.name: express_vs_process
assertions.description: Must clearly distinguish LiveDocs Express (single-step, immediate generation) from LiveDocs Process (multi-step with approvals) and recommend Express for simple use cases

assertions.name: oauth_auth
assertions.description: Must explain OAuth 2.0 authentication — recommend Client Credentials flow for server-to-server or Authorization Code for user-context integrations
